blended.narrative: Badger Pass is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 59°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
